2. Should Leadership Challenges Have a Cooldown Period?

✔ How often should factions be able to change leadership?

3. Should Some Chaos Events Be Player-Activated, or Should They Always Be Random?

✔ Ex: Should a player be able to trigger “The Great Betrayal” if they sacrifice XP?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.3. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 8.4 – Locking in Transformative Paths, Leadership Cooldowns & Player-Activated Chaos


🚀 This iteration finalizes the number of transformative paths, their infection mechanics, faction leadership stability, and how chaos events are triggered.

📜 1. Transformative Paths – Capping at One Per Class with Forced Infection

📜 Only one transformative path can exist per class (max 10 across all classes).
